Suvasish Das.
Home Research
Home Research

I am a first-year Ph.D. student in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IITGN). My key research interest lies in the field of reasoning of Deep Learning models and Multimodal AI. I have completed Masters in Computer Science from West Bengal State University in the year of 2024, where I have been advised by Prof. Rajat Pandit and Prof. Sudip Kumar Naskar. I have completed my Bachelor’s in Computer Science from Barrackpore Rastraguru Surendranath College in the year of 2022, where I worked under the supervision of Prof. Sukalyan Som.

Email LinkedIn Github

Research

My research primarily focuses on multimodal systems architechtures, developing models and techniques that are faster, more efficient and more effective. Broadly, I am interested in models reasoning and imrpoving their power beyond Artificial General Intelligence.

Awards / Grants

Institute Teching Assistentship of Rs. 37K-42K /month awarded by IITGN 07/2026
Receieved honorarium of Rs. 1.2 lakh as tech content creator at BodhiTree, funded by IBM & TowerResearch 10/2025
Institute Teching Assistentship Rs. 37K-42K /month awarded by Indian Institute of Technology, Bombay 01/2025
Inspire Fellowship (round-1) awarded by Department of Science and Technology, Govt. of India 06/2025
